data.name: College Gay Sex - Episode 6
data.detailed_description:
An erotic VISUAL NOVEL featuring HD graphics, steamy ANIMATIONS, and realistic-looking characters.
Cody and Jax face expulsion after sharing inappropriate pictures online that could damage the College’s reputation. Will they convince the Dean to bend the rules for them?

GAME DESCRIPTION

EPISODE 6

Jax posted some inappropriate pictures of him and Cody on social media that went viral, reflecting poorly on the College. Dean Richard, notorious for his strict adherence to the rules, swiftly summons both students to his office for an explanation.

Their actions clearly violate the conduct policy, and the Dean is not one to overlook such breaches without imposing punishment. Faced with the risk of expulsion, Jax attempts to sway him by offering an alternative form of punishment that might be more advantageous for the Dean.

Will Dean Richard bend the rules for them?
Will Cody go along with the risky plan?

Follow their story and find out.

FEATURES

- HD renders and animations
- Video and image gallery

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
